description: Expansion packs (domain-specific persona bundles): packaging mechanism for domain personas beyond software (BMAD ships expansion packs for game dev, creative writing, business strategy). Compose-flavored expansion: persona bundle = `analyst` + `pm` + `architect` + `scrum-master` + `dev` + `qa` variants for a specific domain (e.g. `compose-bmad-data`, `compose-bmad-infra`). Loaded via `.compose/compose.json#bmadPack`. Story sharder respects pack-specific story templates.
